title: Squirrel Removal Upper East Side | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Upper East Side, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction from homes & buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a quote!
intro: Squirrels are a common nuisance in Upper East Side homes and buildings, often nesting in attics, chimneys, and wall voids of the neighborhood's elegant pre-war and luxury high-rise buildings. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout the Upper East Side, from Fifth Avenue to the East River. Our humane and effective solutions protect your property while safely removing these persistent invaders.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Upper East Side residents and property managers for years, understanding the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in this prestigious Manhattan neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use safe, humane removal methods tailored to the area's diverse architecture, from historic brownstones to modern condominiums, ensuring minimal disruption to your daily life.
localContext: The Upper East Side's proximity to Central Park and Carl Schurz Park creates an ideal habitat for squirrels, which frequently migrate into nearby residential buildings seeking shelter and warmth. The neighborhood's mature trees along Museum Mile and side streets provide easy access routes to rooftops and attics, making professional squirrel-proofing essential for property owners.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in the Upper East Side?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in the Upper East Side typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the size of your property. This includes humane trapping, removal, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before starting any work.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Upper East Side buildings?
faqs.answer: The Upper East Side's abundance of mature trees, proximity to Central Park, and mix of pre-war and modern buildings create perfect conditions for squirrels. These agile animals easily jump from tree branches to rooftops, finding entry through vents, chimneys, and small gaps in older building facades. Once inside, attics and wall spaces provide warm nesting areas.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Upper East Side home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in the Upper East Side are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and access points. We begin with a thorough inspection, followed by humane trapping and exclusion. Our team works efficiently to minimize disruption, which is especially important in the densely populated Upper East Side.

faqs.question: Will squirrels return after removal?
faqs.answer: When you choose Best Pest Control NYC, we don't just remove squirrels—we prevent their return. After extraction, we seal all entry points with durable materials, install protective barriers, and trim nearby tree branches when possible. We offer warranties on our exclusion work to give Upper East Side property owners complete peace of mind.
